1.premise: Immigrant solidarity with other immigrants evaporates the moment you get a green card.

2.premise: White people are only now experiencing what Black Americans have long known about law enforcement.

1.premise: Sympathy for a white woman shot by police disappears once you see she was a Karen.

2.premise: Being shot by law enforcement is so routine for Black Americans it barely registers as news.

lines.text: So there were ice raids happening this weekend in Austin.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Holy shit.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: As an immigrant, of course, I am anti-ice.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: However, as soon as I get this green card,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Get these rapists out of my country.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: That's the sort of dude I am.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Once I'm in, I pull the ladder up.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Fuck off, we're full.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I always thought I'm safe from ice 'cause I'm white,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but holy shit, things have changed.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They're shooting white women now.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: The most valuable commodity in America.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: God, I felt bad for that lady.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But then I watched the whole video.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It was about time a Karen got shot. You know what I'm saying?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Too much this is going on, you know?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: This isn't right!
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Stop the garbage!
lines.label: tag

lines.text: - Only white people feel bad for her.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I asked all my black friends, they were like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Oh, shot by law enforcement?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: - Welcome to the game, baby.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: - Thank you so much, you guys are awesome.
lines.label: fluff
